overall.assessment: Podcast pruža duboku i vjernu analizu umjetne inteligencije kroz prizmu katoličke antropologije, naglašavajući 'Imago Dei' kao ključnu razliku između čovjeka i stroja. Autori ispravno identificiraju opasnost digitalnog redukcionizma i zagovaraju obrazovanje usmjereno na vrline i cjelovitu formaciju osobe umjesto pukog utilitarizma. Posebno je vrijedna integracija socijalnog nauka Crkve u kontekstu dostojanstva rada i zaštite radnika pred automatizacijom.
seeds_of_logos: Prepoznavanje AI kao alata koji mora služiti općem dobru i ljudskom dostojanstvu
Naglašavanje važnosti 'srca' i mudrosti (phronesis) u donošenju odluka, što strojevi ne mogu oponašati
Zagovaranje obrazovnog modela koji prednost daje moralnoj formaciji i kritičkom razmišljanju
Primjena načela iz Rerum Novarum na suvremene izazove gubitka posla zbog robotizacije
Poziv na aktivnu ulogu Crkve u usmjeravanju tehnološkog napretka prema etičkim ciljevima
concerns: Rizik od 'tehnologizacije' čovjeka gdje ljudi počinju zrcaliti algoritamske procese razmišljanja
Potencijalno produbljivanje društvenih nejednakosti i 'kulture odbacivanja' kroz nekontroliranu automatizaciju
Izazov očuvanja akademskog integriteta i autentične ljudske interakcije u digitalnom okruženju
overall.theological_context: Analiza se temelji na biblijskom konceptu čovjeka stvorenog na sliku Božju (Post 1,27) i enciklici 'Rerum Novarum' koja štiti dostojanstvo radnika. Oslanja se na učenja pape Franje o 'algoretici' i potrebi za ljudskom kontrolom nad AI (G7 govor, 2024) te na Katekizam Katoličke Crkve u pogledu odgoja u vrlinama (KKC 1803).

score_breakdown.theme: Umjetna inteligencija i katoličko obrazovanje: Etički izazovi i prilike
score_breakdown.theme_en: Artificial intelligence and Catholic education: Ethical challenges and opportunities

iterations.theme: Umjetna inteligencija i katoličko obrazovanje: Etički izazovi i prilike

sections.subtitle: AI i ljudskost: Izazov zrcaljenja i mudrost Crkve
sections.screenshot_description: John Brayer govori o opasnostima da ljudi počnu zrcaliti AI.
sections.content: Na samom početku razgovora, **John Brayer** ističe zabrinjavajući fenomen da veliki jezični modeli (LLM) počinju zvučati sve ljudskije. Međutim, veća je briga, kako objašnjava, da bi ljudi mogli početi zvučati i razmišljati poput njih, zrcaljeći njihove izlaze. Postoje istraživanja koja ukazuju da se to već događa. Brayer naglašava da Crkva, sa svojom bogatom antropologijom i dvije tisuće godina mudrosti, ima ključnu ulogu u identificiranju problema i prilika koje donosi umjetna inteligencija te u pronalaženju načina za njihovu primjenu.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak snažno promiče katolički nauk naglašavajući opasnost 'tehnologizacije' čovjeka i gubitka specifično ljudskih kvaliteta.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva upozorava da funkcionalni automatizmi ostaju kvalitativno udaljeni od ljudskih prerogativa znanja i djelovanja. Postoji stvaran rizik da ljudi budu 'tehnologizirani' umjesto da tehnologija bude humanizirana, pripisujući strojevima sposobnosti koje su isključivo ljudske.

citations.document_title: To Participants in the Plenary Assembly of the Pontifical Academy for Life (25 February 2019) (Pope Francis),
Antiqua et Nova (The Old and the New): Note on the Relationship Between Artificial Intelligence and Human Intelligence
citations.document_author: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith and the Dicastery for Culture and Education

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage strongly promotes Catholic teaching, emphasizing the danger of the 'technologization' of man and the loss of specifically human qualities.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church warns that functional automatisms remain qualitatively distant from human prerogatives of knowledge and action. There is a real risk that people will be 'technologized' instead of technology being humanized, attributing to machines abilities which are exclusively human.

sections.subtitle_en: AI and humanity: The challenge of mirroring and the wisdom of the Church
sections.screenshot_description_en: John Brayer speaks about the dangers of people beginning to mirror AI.
sections.content_en: At the very beginning of the conversation, **John Brayer** highlights a worrying phenomenon that large language models (LLMs) are beginning to sound increasingly human. However, the greater concern, as he explains, is that people could begin to sound and think like them, mirroring their outputs. There are studies indicating that this is already happening. Brayer emphasizes that the Church, with its rich anthropology and two thousand years of wisdom, has a key role in identifying the problems and opportunities brought by artificial intelligence and in finding ways for their application.

sections.subtitle: Konferencija 'Builders AI': Dobrodošlica i kontekst
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj pozdravlja goste na konferenciji 'Builders AI'.
sections.content: Voditelj podcasta srdačno pozdravlja **dr. Aarona Domingueza** i **Johna Brayera**, izražavajući zadovoljstvo što su gosti na konferenciji 'Builders AI'. Konferencija služi kao platforma za raspravu o utjecaju umjetne inteligencije na različite sektore, uključujući obrazovanje, što je i glavna tema ovog razgovora. Dr. Dominguez izražava svoje uzbuđenje zbog sudjelovanja na konferenciji i razgovora o ovoj važnoj temi.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak je usklađen s naukom jer postavlja platformu za dijalog o utjecaju tehnologije na društvo.
magisterium.enrichment: Znanost i tehnologija su briljantni proizvodi ljudskog kreativnog potencijala, a AI proizlazi upravo iz tog Bogom danog dara. Crkva potiče razvojne procese koji poštuju vrijednosti poput inkluzije, transparentnosti i sigurnosti radi općeg dobra.

citations.document_title: Pope Francis Attends the G7 Session on Artificial Intelligence (13-15 June 2024) (Pope Francis),
Encyclical Letter of His Holiness Leo XIV Magnifica Humanitas (15 May 2026)

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage is aligned with the teaching because it sets a platform for dialogue about the influence of technology on society.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Science and technology are brilliant products of human creative potential, and AI arises precisely from that God-given gift. The Church encourages developmental processes that respect values such as inclusion, transparency, and security for the sake of the common good.

sections.screenshot_description_en: The host greets the guests at the 'Builders AI' conference.
sections.content_en: The podcast host cordially greets **dr. Aaron Dominguez** and **John Brayer**, expressing pleasure that they are guests at the 'Builders AI' conference. The conference serves as a platform for discussion about the impact of artificial intelligence on various sectors, including education, which is also the main theme of this conversation. Dr. Dominguez expresses his excitement because of participating in the conference and the conversation about this important theme.

sections.subtitle: AI u obrazovanju: Osobno iskustvo i novi program Katoličkog sveučilišta
sections.screenshot_description: Dr. Aaron Dominguez objašnjava novi AI program na Katoličkom sveučilištu.
sections.content: **Dr. Aaron Dominguez** dijeli svoje osobno iskustvo kao ranog usvojitelja tehnologije, ističući kako su mu AI alati pomogli da postane učinkovitiji. Naglašava da je umjetna inteligencija tu da ostane. Prošle godine, na konferenciji, dr. Dominguez je bio spreman pokrenuti novi diplomski i magistarski studij umjetne inteligencije na Katoličkom sveučilištu u Americi. Ovaj program je jedinstven jer integrira katoličku etiku i nauk Crkve u kurikulum, osiguravajući da studenti ne uče samo programiranje i teoriju, već i filozofiju i teologiju kako bi mogli dizajnirati i koristiti AI alate s vjerske perspektive. S ponosom ističe da je program uspješno pokrenut ovog jesenskog semestra.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak je usklađen s naukom jer prepoznaje AI kao alat za poboljšanje ljudske učinkovitosti i obrazovanja.
magisterium.enrichment: AI je alat čija korist ili šteta ovisi o njegovoj uporabi, a ljudsko dostojanstvo zahtijeva očuvanje prostora za ljudsku kontrolu nad tim programima. Katolička sveučilišta imaju istaknutu ulogu u prenošenju antropoloških i moralnih vrijednosti kroz sve discipline.

citations.document_title: Pope Francis Attends the G7 Session on Artificial Intelligence (13-15 June 2024) (Pope Francis),
Apostolic Letter 'Drawing New Maps of Hope' of Pope Leo XIV

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage is aligned with the teaching because it recognizes AI as a tool for the improvement of human efficiency and education.
magisterium.enrichment_en: AI is a tool whose benefit or harm depends on its use, and human dignity requires the preservation of space for human control over those programs. Catholic universities have a prominent role in transmitting anthropological and moral values through all disciplines.

sections.subtitle_en: AI in education: Personal experience and the new program of the Catholic University
sections.screenshot_description_en: Dr. Aaron Dominguez explains the new AI program at the Catholic University.
sections.content_en: **Dr. Aaron Dominguez** shares his personal experience as an early adopter of technology, highlighting how AI tools helped him become more efficient. He emphasizes that artificial intelligence is here to stay. Last year, at a conference, Dr. Dominguez was ready to launch a new undergraduate and master's study of artificial intelligence at the Catholic University of America. This program is unique because it integrates Catholic ethics and the teaching of the Church into the curriculum, ensuring that students do not only learn programming and theory, but also philosophy and theology so that they can design and use AI tools from a religious perspective. He points out with pride that the program was successfully launched this fall semester.

sections.subtitle: AI kao pedagoški izazov: Preispitivanje filozofije obrazovanja
sections.screenshot_description: John Brayer govori o AI kao prilici za preispitivanje pedagogije.
sections.content: **John Brayer** objašnjava da je umjetna inteligencija prisutna u učionicama godinama, čak i prije pojave ChatGPT-a 2022. godine, ali je njezina upotreba bila suptilnija. S dolaskom ChatGPT-a, AI je postala neizbježna stvarnost. Brayer ističe da AI predstavlja veliku priliku za preispitivanje same filozofije obrazovanja. Iako mnogi nastavnici AI vide prvenstveno kao alat za varanje, ona ih prisiljava da se suoče s dubljim pitanjima: 'Zašto podučavamo?' i 'Koja je svrha obrazovanja?'. Ova pitanja, koja su često zanemarena zbog svakodnevnih obaveza, sada postaju ključna pri formuliranju politika i prilagodbi nastavnih planova, što dovodi do nužnih filozofskih i pedagoških rasprava.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak promiče nauk pozivajući na duboko preispitivanje pedagogije u svjetlu novih tehnoloških izazova.
magisterium.enrichment: Katolička škola mora biti laboratorij kulture koji ne dopušta iluziju da se ljudski prosperitet može postići samo znanošću i tehnologijom. Potrebno je sintetizirati nove pedagoške struje s kršćanskim humanizmom kako bi se mladi zaštitili od zamjene informacija za mudrost.

citations.document_title: The Religious Dimension of Education in a Catholic School: Guidelines for Reflection and Renewal

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage promotes teaching by calling for a deep re-examination of pedagogy in light of new technological challenges.
magisterium.enrichment_en: A Catholic school must be a laboratory of culture that does not allow the illusion that human prosperity can be achieved only by science and technology. It is necessary to synthesize new pedagogical currents with Christian humanism in order to protect the youth from substituting information for wisdom.

sections.subtitle_en: AI as a pedagogical challenge: Re-examining the philosophy of education
sections.screenshot_description_en: John Brayer speaks about AI as an opportunity for re-examining pedagogy.
sections.content_en: **John Brayer** explains that artificial intelligence has been present in classrooms for years, even before the appearance of ChatGPT in 2022, but its use was subtler. With the arrival of ChatGPT, AI has become an inevitable reality. Brayer points out that AI represents a great opportunity for rethinking the very philosophy of education. Although many teachers see AI primarily as a tool for cheating, it forces them to face deeper questions: 'Why do we teach?' and 'What is the purpose of education?'. These questions, which are often neglected due to daily obligations, are now becoming key in formulating policies and adapting curricula, which leads to necessary philosophical and pedagogical discussions.

sections.subtitle: Katoličko vs. utilitarističko obrazovanje: Svrha i formacija
sections.screenshot_description: John Brayer objašnjava razliku između katoličkog i utilitarističkog obrazovanja.
sections.content: **John Brayer** povlači jasnu razliku između katoličkog i utilitarističkog pristupa obrazovanju. Dok se utilitaristički model, često prisutan u svjetovnim školama, fokusira na komercijalizaciju vještina i stjecanje osnovnih činjenica, katolička perspektiva to smatra pogrešnim. Za katoličko obrazovanje, svrha je formativno iskustvo koje učenika priprema za cjeloživotno učenje, apostolat i, u konačnici, za svetost. Ova fundamentalna razlika postavlja potpuno drugačiji skup pitanja o ulozi i primjeni AI alata, naglašavajući važnost dubljeg smisla i svrhe u obrazovnom procesu.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak savršeno odražava katolički nauk o cjelovitoj formaciji osobe nasuprot pukom utilitarizmu.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva naglašava da obrazovanje nije samo prijenos činjenica, već usmjeravanje osobe prema njezinom konačnom cilju i općem dobru društva. Katolički svjetonazor podređuje intelektualna postignuća višem cilju 'beatitudo' ili vječnom blaženstvu.

citations.document_title: Antiqua et Nova (The Old and the New): Note on the Relationship Between Artificial Intelligence and Human Intelligence
citations.document_author: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith and the Dicastery for Culture and Education

citations.document_title: The Three Pillars of Catholic Education
The Three Pillars of Catholic Education

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage perfectly reflects Catholic teaching on the integral formation of the person as opposed to mere utilitarianism.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church emphasizes that education is not only a transfer of facts, but the directing of a person toward their final goal and the common good of society. The Catholic worldview subordinates intellectual achievements to the higher goal of 'beatitudo' or eternal beatitude.

sections.subtitle_en: Catholic vs. utilitarian education: Purpose and formation
sections.screenshot_description_en: John Brayer explains the difference between Catholic and utilitarian education.
sections.content_en: **John Brayer** draws a clear distinction between the Catholic and utilitarian approach to education. While the utilitarian model, often present in secular schools, focuses on the commercialization of skills and the acquisition of basic facts, the Catholic perspective considers this wrong. For Catholic education, the purpose is a formative experience that prepares the student for lifelong learning, the apostolate, and, ultimately, for holiness. This fundamental difference poses a completely different set of questions about the role and application of AI tools, emphasizing the importance of deeper meaning and purpose in the educational process.

sections.subtitle: Jedinstvena uloga katoličkog obrazovanja u vođenju AI ere
sections.screenshot_description: Dr. Aaron Dominguez govori o misiji Katoličkog sveučilišta.
sections.content: **Dr. Aaron Dominguez** objašnjava da katoličko obrazovanje ima jedinstvenu ulogu u vođenju ere umjetne inteligencije. Postavlja pitanje što katoličko obrazovanje čini drugačijim od svjetovnog, naglašavajući da to nije samo molitva ili misa, već dublja svrha. Na primjer, Katoličko sveučilište u Americi ima posebnu misiju, koju je postavio papa Lav XIII., da proizvodi 'vrijedne ministre' i 'dobro oblikovane građane' za zemlju i svijet. S obzirom na to da je AI nova stvarnost koja mijenja doba, poput tiskarskog stroja ili industrijske revolucije, Crkva, s dvije tisuće godina razmišljanja i učenja, ima neprocjenjivu mudrost za promišljanje ovih izazova. Katoličko obrazovanje, s jasnim razumijevanjem ljudske naravi i svrhe postojanja, može pružiti etički okvir za navigaciju u ovom novom dobu.

magisterium.assessment: Sadržaj je snažno usklađen s crkvenim pozivom na formaciju vrlina i razumijevanje ljudske svrhe u digitalnom dobu.
magisterium.enrichment: Istinsko obrazovanje nastoji oblikovati pojedince s pogledom na njihov konačni kraj, harmonizirajući intelektualne i moralne talente. U eri AI, ključno je da tehnologija ostane usmjerena na čovjeka i etički utemeljena.

citations.document_title: Code of Canons of the Eastern Churches
Antiqua et Nova (The Old and the New): Note on the Relationship Between Artificial Intelligence and Human Intelligence
citations.document_author: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith and the Dicastery for Culture and Education

citations.document_title: Antiqua et Nova (The Old and the New): Note on the Relationship Between Artificial Intelligence and Human Intelligence
citations.document_author: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith and the Dicastery for Culture and Education

magisterium.assessment_en: The content is strongly aligned with the Church's call to the formation of virtues and the understanding of human purpose in the digital age.
magisterium.enrichment_en: True education strives to form individuals with a view to their final end, harmonizing intellectual and moral talents. In the era of AI, it is crucial that technology remains human-centered and ethically grounded.

sections.subtitle_en: The unique role of Catholic education in leading the AI era
sections.screenshot_description_en: Dr. Aaron Dominguez speaks about the mission of the Catholic University.
sections.content_en: **Dr. Aaron Dominguez** explains that Catholic education has a unique role in leading the era of artificial intelligence. He poses the question of what makes Catholic education different from secular education, emphasizing that it is not just prayer or Mass, but a deeper purpose. For example, The Catholic University of America has a special mission, set by Pope Leo XIII, to produce 'worthy ministers' and 'well-formed citizens' for the country and the world. Given that AI is a new reality that is changing the era, like the printing press or the industrial revolution, the Church, with two thousand years of reflection and teaching, has invaluable wisdom for reflecting on these challenges. Catholic education, with a clear understanding of human nature and the purpose of existence, can provide an ethical framework for navigating in this new era.

sections.subtitle: Razlikovanje čovjeka od AI: Imago Dei i opasnosti bez ljudskog fokusa
sections.screenshot_description: Dr. Aaron Dominguez objašnjava koncept Imago Dei u kontekstu AI.
sections.content: **Dr. Aaron Dominguez** naglašava ključnu sposobnost katoličkog obrazovanja da razlikuje čovjeka od umjetne inteligencije. Ističe da Crkva, kroz koncept *Imago Dei* (slike Božje), razumije što je ljudsko biće i koja je svrha njegovog postojanja – poznavati i voljeti Boga. Ova perspektiva omogućuje razlikovanje između AI simulacija i stvarne ljudske osobe. Bez takvog razumijevanja, moćni i potencijalno opasni AI alati mogu dovesti do strašnih posljedica. Dominguez uspoređuje AI s nožem – alatom koji se može koristiti za dobro ili za zlo, ovisno o namjeri korisnika. Katolička izobrazba pruža okvir i odgovore koji su nedostupni sekularnom obrazovanju, osiguravajući da ljudsko dostojanstvo ostane u središtu tehnološkog napretka.

magisterium.assessment: Ispravno identificira 'Imago Dei' kao temelj razlikovanja čovjeka od stroja i zaštitu ljudskog dostojanstva.
magisterium.enrichment: Ljudsko dostojanstvo ukorijenjeno je u stvaranju na sliku Božju, što uključuje neraskidivo jedinstvo tijela i duše koje AI ne može posjedovati. Bez ljudskog fokusa, delegiranje odluka strojevima ugrožava sposobnost osobe da odlučuje o vlastitom životu.

citations.document_title: Antiqua et Nova (The Old and the New): Note on the Relationship Between Artificial Intelligence and Human Intelligence
citations.document_author: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith and the Dicastery for Culture and Education

citations.document_title: La Inteligencia Artificial: Una mirada pastoral desde América Latina y el Caribe

magisterium.assessment_en: It correctly identifies 'Imago Dei' as the foundation of distinguishing man from machine and the protection of human dignity.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Human dignity is rooted in creation in the image of God, which includes the inseparable unity of body and soul which AI cannot possess. Without human focus, delegating decisions to machines endangers the ability of the person to decide about their own life.

sections.subtitle_en: Distinguishing man from AI: Imago Dei and the dangers without a human focus
sections.screenshot_description_en: Dr. Aaron Dominguez explains the concept of Imago Dei in the context of AI.
sections.content_en: **Dr. Aaron Dominguez** emphasizes the key ability of Catholic education to distinguish man from artificial intelligence. He points out that the Church, through the concept of *Imago Dei* (image of God), understands what a human being is and what the purpose of his existence is – to know and love God. This perspective enables the distinction between AI simulations and a real human person. Without such understanding, powerful and potentially dangerous AI tools can lead to terrible consequences. Dominguez compares AI to a knife – a tool that can be used for good or for evil, depending on the intention of the user. Catholic education provides a framework and answers that are unavailable to secular education, ensuring that human dignity remains at the center of technological progress.

sections.subtitle: Utjecaj AI na visoko obrazovanje i misionarska uloga Crkve
sections.screenshot_description: Dr. Aaron Dominguez govori o utilitarizmu i njegovim posljedicama.
sections.content:
**Dr. Aaron Dominguez** primjećuje da umjetna inteligencija doprinosi već postojećim negativnim čimbenicima u visokom obrazovanju, koje se suočava s kritikama i potrebom za korekcijom. Upozorava na opasnosti čistog utilitarizma, koji, kako kaže, može dovesti do strašnih ishoda poput Holokausta, naglašavajući potrebu da se takav smjer izbjegne pod svaku cijenu. Vjeruje da ljudi dobre volje u svjetovnim sveučilištima traže suradnju s katoličkim institucijama, što Katoličko sveučilište vidi kao misionarsku priliku za slanje 'misionara u svijet'.

**John Brayer** nadopunjuje ovu misao povijesnim kontekstom, ističući kako je Bog pripremao Crkvu za ovaj trenutak kroz događaje poput Industrijske revolucije i procvata katoličkog socijalnog učenja, te teologije tijela Ivana Pavla II. Unatoč sve sekularnijem svijetu, primjećuje rastući interes za dublja egzistencijalna pitanja, što Crkvi omogućuje da izravno govori o srži stvari.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak točno prepoznaje misionarsku ulogu Crkve u prožimanju kulture i obrazovanja evanđeoskim vrijednostima usred AI izazova.
magisterium.enrichment: Misija Crkve zahtijeva da snaga Evanđelja prožme obrasce razmišljanja i standarde prosudbe u visokom obrazovanju. Katolička sveučilišta moraju integrirati istine vjere s istraživanjem kako bi služila autentičnom ljudskom razvoju.

citations.document_title: Lecture during the visit to the Catholic University of America in Washington (October 7, 1979) - Speech (Pope John Paul II),
Africae Munus
Meeting with the university community in the Atma Jaya Catholic University of Jakarta (October 12, 1989) - Speech (Pope John Paul II),

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage accurately recognizes the missionary role of the Church in permeating culture and education with Gospel values amidst AI challenges.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The mission of the Church requires that the power of the Gospel permeates patterns of thinking and standards of judgment in higher education. Catholic universities must integrate the truths of faith with research in order to serve authentic human development.

sections.subtitle_en: The impact of AI on higher education and the missionary role of the Church
sections.screenshot_description_en: Dr. Aaron Dominguez speaks about utilitarianism and its consequences.
sections.content_en:
**Dr. Aaron Dominguez** notices that artificial intelligence contributes to already existing negative factors in higher education, which faces criticisms and the need for correction. He warns of the dangers of pure utilitarianism, which, as he says, can lead to terrible outcomes like the Holocaust, emphasizing the need to avoid such a direction at any cost. He believes that people of good will in secular universities seek cooperation with Catholic institutions, which the Catholic University sees as a missionary opportunity for sending 'missionaries into the world'.

**John Brayer** complements this thought with historical context, pointing out how God was preparing the Church for this moment through events like the Industrial Revolution and the flourishing of Catholic social teaching, and the theology of the body of Ivan Pavao II. Despite an increasingly secular world, he notices a growing interest in deeper existential questions, which enables the Church to speak directly about the core of things.

sections.subtitle: Povijesni kontekst i izazovi AI: Akademski integritet i zrcaljenje LLM-ova
sections.screenshot_description: John Brayer objašnjava kako AI utječe na akademski integritet i pisanje.
sections.content: Nastavljajući na povijesni kontekst, **John Brayer** ističe kako se Crkva, kroz povijest, providonosno pripremala za suočavanje s izazovima poput umjetne inteligencije. Kada je riječ o praktičnoj primjeni u katoličkim školama, Brayer naglašava važnost identificiranja problematičnih područja. Jedno od prvih pitanja koje se nameće u razgovorima s nastavnicima je **akademski integritet**. Iako je to početna točka, Brayerova dublja briga leži u prekidu iterativnog procesa pisanja. Nepravilno korištenje AI može smanjiti broj iteracija, čime se ozbiljno ograničava kvaliteta i originalnost studentskog rada. Još veća zabrinutost je fenomen 'zrcaljenja' – da ljudi počinju zvučati i razmišljati poput LLM-ova, što je trend koji je već dokumentiran istraživanjima. Brayer ponovno ističe da Crkva, sa svojom bogatom antropologijom i dvije tisuće godina mudrosti, mora voditi u rješavanju ovih problema i iskorištavanju prilika.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak je u potpunosti usklađen s naukom jer prepoznaje providonosnu ulogu Crkve i nužnost zaštite akademskog integriteta kao oblika svjedočenja istine.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva naglašava da je čovjek po naravi usmjeren prema istini i dužan joj je svjedočiti, što u obrazovanju uključuje izbjegavanje dvoličnosti i prijevare. Digitalna pismenost mora uključivati obrazovanje o istini o Bogu i čovjeku kako bi se tehnologija integrirala u cjeloviti kršćanski život.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
To Participants in the International Conference on Media and Digital Literacy (22 May 2026)

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage is fully aligned with the teaching because it recognizes the providential role of the Church and the necessity of protecting academic integrity as a form of witnessing to the truth.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church emphasizes that man is by nature directed toward the truth and is obliged to witness to it, which in education includes the avoidance of duplicity and deception. Digital literacy must include education about the truth about God and man so that technology would be integrated into an integral Christian life.

sections.subtitle_en: Historical context and challenges of AI: Academic integrity and mirroring of LLMs
sections.screenshot_description_en: John Brayer explains how AI affects academic integrity and writing.
sections.content_en: Continuing on the historical context, **John Brayer** points out how the Church, through history, providentially prepared itself for facing challenges like artificial intelligence. When it comes to practical application in Catholic schools, Brayer emphasizes the importance of identifying problematic areas. One of the first questions that arises in conversations with teachers is **academic integrity**. Although that is the starting point, Brayer's deeper concern lies in the interruption of the iterative process of writing. Improper use of AI can reduce the number of iterations, thereby seriously limiting the quality and originality of student work. An even greater concern is the phenomenon of 'mirroring' – that people are beginning to sound and think like LLMs, which is a trend that has already been documented by research. Brayer again points out that the Church, with its rich anthropology and two thousand years of wisdom, must lead in solving these problems and exploiting opportunities.

sections.subtitle: AI i gubitak posla: Priprema radne snage i etička pitanja
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj priča anegdotu o reklami koja potiče zapošljavanje robota.
sections.content:
Voditelj dijeli anegdotu o reklami u Bostonu koja je promovirala zapošljavanje robota umjesto ljudi, s porukom 'Nemojte zaposliti ljude, zaposlite nas, robote'. Ova reklama, koja je šokirala jednog studenta, otvara pitanje o utjecaju AI na tržište rada.

**Dr. Aaron Dominguez** objašnjava da će strojevi moći učinkovitije obavljati određene poslove, što će dovesti do gubitka radnih mjesta. Međutim, on naglašava da je uloga Katoličkog sveučilišta pripremiti studente, uključujući i one iz humanističkih znanosti, za korištenje ovih alata. Cilj je osposobiti radnu snagu za rad u tehnološkoj industriji i pomoći onima čija su radna mjesta ugrožena da se prekvalificiraju. Dominguez ističe da je to ključni zadatak sveučilišta u ovom trenutku, jer će oni koji ne nauče koristiti nove alate biti u nepovoljnom položaju.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak ispravno identificira etičke izazove automatizacije i naglašava primat čovjeka nad strojem u kontekstu rada.
magisterium.enrichment: Rad je 'za čovjeka', a ne čovjek za rad; stoga tehnologija mora služiti dostojanstvu osobe, a ne pretvarati radnika u puki 'proizvod' ili sredstvo. Crkva se protivi svakom obliku tehnološkog napretka koji bi postao neprijatelj općeg dobra ili uzrokovao nepravedne nejednakosti.

citations.document_title: General Audience of 19 March 1997
Address of His Holiness Pope Francis "The Common Good in the Digital Age" (Pope Francis),

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage correctly identifies the ethical challenges of automation and emphasizes the primacy of man over the machine in the context of work.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Work is 'for man', and not man for work; therefore technology must serve the dignity of the person, and not turn the worker into a mere 'product' or means. The Church opposes every form of technological progress which would become an enemy of the common good or cause unjust inequalities.

sections.subtitle_en: AI and job loss: Workforce preparation and ethical questions
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host tells an anecdote about an advertisement that encourages the hiring of robots.
sections.content_en:
The host shares an anecdote about an advertisement in Boston that promoted the hiring of robots instead of people, with the message 'Don't hire people, hire us, robots'. This advertisement, which shocked a student, opens the question about the impact of AI on the labor market.

**Dr. Aaron Dominguez** explains that machines will be able to perform certain jobs more efficiently, which will lead to the loss of jobs. However, he emphasizes that the role of the Catholic University is to prepare students, including those from the humanities, for the use of these tools. The goal is to train the workforce for work in the technology industry and to help those whose jobs are threatened to retrain. Dominguez points out that this is the key task of the university at this moment, because those who do not learn to use new tools will be at a disadvantage.

sections.subtitle: Postavljanje granica za korištenje AI: Ljudski odnosi i procvat
sections.screenshot_description: John Brayer govori o važnosti ljudskih odnosa u obrazovanju.
sections.content: Na pitanje o postavljanju granica za korištenje AI u obrazovanju, **John Brayer** se poziva na nedavno pismo pape Franje, koje upozorava na ekstreme: tehnofobiju (povratak u 'špilje') i digitalni redukcionizam (komercijalizacija učenja i uklanjanje ljudi iz procesa). Brayer ističe da upotreba AI u obrazovnim okruženjima mora pratiti ljudski odnos između učenika i nastavnika, citirajući (parafrazirajući) *Antiqua in Nova*. Naglašava da učionice moraju biti mjesta fizičkog susreta, a tehnologija, uključujući AI, treba služiti ljudskom procvatu i olakšavati te odnose. Razboritost je ključna pri određivanju granica, uzimajući u obzir dob učenika i specifičnosti obrazovnog okruženja (npr. sveučilište naspram osnovne škole).

magisterium.assessment: Izvrsno pogađa srž papinskih upozorenja o izbjegavanju tehnofobije uz istovremeno odbacivanje digitalnog redukcionizma koji ugrožava ljudske odnose.
magisterium.enrichment: Papa Franjo upozorava da algoritmi mogu otupiti kritičko razmišljanje i slobodu ako se korisnike svede na puke potrošače. Potrebno je ponovno otkriti ljudski susret u srži komunikacije, jer digitalni svijet mora biti prostor za 'ljubazne bližnje', a ne samo za pasivnu upotrebu.

citations.document_title: Meeting with the participants in the Plenary Assembly of the Pontifical Academy of Life (Pope Francis),
Towards Full Presence: A Pastoral Reflection on Engagement with Social Media

magisterium.assessment_en: It excellently hits the core of papal warnings about avoiding technophobia while simultaneously rejecting digital reductionism which endangers human relationships.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Pope Francis warns that algorithms can dull critical thinking and freedom if users are reduced to mere consumers. It is necessary to rediscover the human encounter at the core of communication, because the digital world must be a space for 'kind neighbors', and not only for passive use.

sections.subtitle_en: Setting boundaries for the use of AI: Human relationships and flourishing
sections.screenshot_description_en: John Brayer speaks about the importance of human relationships in education.
sections.content_en: On the question of setting boundaries for the use of AI in education, **John Brayer** refers to a recent letter from Pope Francis, which warns of extremes: technophobia (returning to 'caves') and digital reductionism (commercialization of learning and the removal of people from the process). Brayer emphasizes that the use of AI in educational environments must follow the human relationship between student and teacher, quoting (paraphrasing) *Antiqua in Nova*. He emphasizes that classrooms must be places of physical encounter, and technology, including AI, should serve human flourishing and facilitate those relationships. Prudence is key when determining boundaries, taking into account the age of the students and the specificities of the educational environment (e.g., university versus elementary school).

sections.subtitle: Tri stupa etičke interakcije s AI: Čovjek kao protagonist, vrlina, autentična interakcija
sections.screenshot_description: Dr. Aaron Dominguez objašnjava tri stupa etičke interakcije s AI.
sections.content:
**Dr. Aaron Dominguez** predstavlja tri ključna stupa za etičku interakciju s umjetnom inteligencijom, razvijena tijekom osmišljavanja novog AI kurikuluma: 

1.  **Čovjek kao protagonist:** Interakcija između čovjeka i stroja mora imati ljudsko biće kao glavnog protagonista. Budući da je čovjek stvoren na sliku i priliku Božju, on mora biti u središtu te interakcije. Pravilan redoslijed je da alat služi osobi, a ne obrnuto. 
2.  **Vrlina i procvat:** Interakcija s AI treba otvarati put ljudskom procvatu i rastu u vrlinama. Dizajn AI sustava treba poticati dobro, a izbjegavati mane. Dominguez navodi primjer 'umjetne djevojke' kao nečega što ne potiče rast u vrlinama, ljubav ili procvat. 
3.  **Autentična ljudska interakcija:** AI bi trebala voditi ka autentičnoj ljudskoj interakciji. Primjerice, korištenje AI za istraživanje prije podcasta može poboljšati raspravu licem u lice, što je cilj. Ako AI olakšava dublje i smislenije ljudske susrete, onda služi svojoj svrsi.

magisterium.assessment: Tri stupa (čovjek protagonist, vrlina, autentičnost) odražavaju ključne elemente katoličke antropologije i etike u digitalnom dobu.
magisterium.enrichment: Ljudski procvat zahtijeva razvoj vrlina koje usmjeravaju osobu prema njezinom cilju, pri čemu su poniznost i istinitost temeljne. Autentična interakcija je ključna jer umjetni uređaji, iako simuliraju ljudske sposobnosti, nemaju ljudsku kvalitetu, savjest ni emocionalnu intencionalnost.

citations.document_title: The Three Pillars of Catholic Education
Catechism of the Catholic Church
To Participants in the Plenary Assembly of the Pontifical Academy for Life (25 February 2019) (Pope Francis),

magisterium.assessment_en: Three pillars (man protagonist, virtue, authenticity) reflect key elements of Catholic anthropology and ethics in the digital age.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Human flourishing requires the development of virtues which direct a person toward their goal, where humility and truthfulness are fundamental. Authentic interaction is key because artificial devices, although they simulate human abilities, do not have human quality, conscience, nor emotional intentionality.

sections.subtitle_en: Three pillars of ethical interaction with AI: Man as protagonist, virtue, authentic interaction
sections.screenshot_description_en: Dr. Aaron Dominguez explains three pillars of ethical interaction with AI.
sections.content_en:
**Dr. Aaron Dominguez** presents three key pillars for ethical interaction with artificial intelligence, developed during the design of a new AI curriculum: 

1.  **Man as protagonist:** Interaction between man and machine must have the human being as the main protagonist. Since man is created in the image and likeness of God, he must be at the center of that interaction. The proper order is for the tool to serve the person, and not vice versa. 
2.  **Virtue and flourishing:** Interaction with AI should open the way to human flourishing and growth in virtues. The design of AI systems should encourage good and avoid vices. Dominguez cites the example of an 'artificial girlfriend' as something that does not encourage growth in virtues, love, or flourishing. 
3.  **Authentic human interaction:** AI should lead toward authentic human interaction. For example, using AI for research before a podcast can improve a face-to-face discussion, which is the goal. If AI facilitates deeper and more meaningful human encounters, then it serves its purpose.

sections.subtitle: AI za poboljšanu ljudsku interakciju i identitet kroz rad
sections.screenshot_description: John Brayer govori o povezanosti identiteta i rada.
sections.content: **John Brayer** nadovezuje se na ideju autentične ljudske interakcije, navodeći primjer nastavnika koji potiču učenike da koriste AI alate za pripremu razrednih rasprava, istraživanje ili vježbanje izlaganja. Cilj je da AI služi kao sredstvo za poboljšanje osobnog susreta i interakcije u učionici. Drugi stup, ljudski procvat, Brayer povezuje s pitanjem rada i identiteta. Priznaje da je osobno teško odvojiti vlastiti identitet od rada, jer je rad često suštinski dio onoga što jesmo. U kontekstu potencijalnog gubitka posla zbog AI, to postaje posebno važno, jer se ljudi suočavaju s egzistencijalnom krizom kada im se oduzme ono što ih je definiralo. To postavlja duboka pitanja o smislu života i ljudskom procvatu, koja nadilaze samo katoličko obrazovanje i postaju pastoralno pitanje za cijelu Crkvu.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak izvrsno promiče nauk jer naglašava AI kao alat koji služi ljudskoj interakciji, a ne kao njezinu zamjenu.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva uči da je AI alat čija korist ovisi o upotrebi, a ljudsko odlučivanje mora ostati središnje kako bi se izbjegla 'kultura odbacivanja'. Tehnologija treba poticati autentične odnose i kreativnost, a ne pasivnu konzumaciju sadržaja.

citations.document_title: Pope Francis Attends the G7 Session on Artificial Intelligence (13-15 June 2024) (Pope Francis),
Antiqua et Nova (The Old and the New): Note on the Relationship Between Artificial Intelligence and Human Intelligence
citations.document_author: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith and the Dicastery for Culture and Education

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage excellently promotes the teaching because it emphasizes AI as a tool that serves human interaction, and not as its replacement.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church teaches that AI is a tool whose benefit depends on use, and human decision-making must remain central in order to avoid the 'throwaway culture'. Technology should encourage authentic relationships and creativity, and not passive consumption of content.

sections.subtitle_en: AI for improved human interaction and identity through work
sections.screenshot_description_en: John Brayer speaks about the connection between identity and work.
sections.content_en: **John Brayer** builds on the idea of authentic human interaction, citing the example of teachers who encourage students to use AI tools for preparing class discussions, research, or practicing presentations. The goal is for AI to serve as a means for improving personal encounter and interaction in the classroom. The second pillar, human flourishing, Brayer connects with the question of work and identity. He admits that it is personally difficult to separate one's own identity from work, because work is often an essential part of what we are. In the context of potential job loss due to AI, this becomes especially important, because people face an existential crisis when what defined them is taken away. This poses deep questions about the meaning of life and human flourishing, which transcend only Catholic education and become a pastoral question for the whole Church.

sections.subtitle: Rerum Novarum i ljudsko dostojanstvo: Vrijednost rada i bol gubitka posla
sections.screenshot_description: Dr. Aaron Dominguez povezuje Rerum Novarum s dostojanstvom rada.
sections.content: **Dr. Aaron Dominguez** povezuje raspravu o gubitku posla s enciklikom *Rerum Novarum*, sugerirajući da će buduća verzija te enciklike, 'Rerum Novarum 2.0', vjerojatno naglasiti ljudsko dostojanstvo. Ističe da rad, posebno za muškarce, doprinosi ljudskom dostojanstvu, a pravedna plaća za častan rad pruža osjećaj vrijednosti. Oduzimanje tog rada, bez obzira na razlog, uzrokuje veliku bol. **John Brayer** dodaje da je taj problem sada još akutniji jer gubitak posla zbog automatizacije trenutno najviše pogađa zaposlenike na nižim razinama i one koji tek izlaze s fakulteta, jer su to poslovi koji se najlakše automatiziraju. To stvara pastoralne probleme, posebno za demografsku skupinu od dvadeset do dvadeset pet godina, a s vremenom će se taj problem širiti kako se AI bude poboljšavala.

magisterium.assessment: Sadržaj je u potpunosti usklađen s naukom o dostojanstvu rada i potrebom zaštite radnika od dehumanizirajućih učinaka tehnologije.
magisterium.enrichment: Rad ima inherentnu vrijednost i ključan je za dostojanstvo osobe; on nije samo sredstvo zarade već način sudjelovanja u Božjem stvaralačkom djelu. Gubitak posla zbog automatizacije zahtijeva društvenu zaštitu i prekvalifikaciju kako bi se očuvao subjektivni karakter rada.

citations.document_title: Rerum Novarum
Rerum Novarum

magisterium.assessment_en: The content is fully aligned with the teaching on the dignity of work and the need to protect workers from the dehumanizing effects of technology.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Work has inherent value and is crucial for the dignity of the person; it is not only a means of earning but a way of participating in God's creative work. Loss of job due to automation requires social protection and retraining in order to preserve the subjective character of work.

sections.subtitle_en: Rerum Novarum and human dignity: The value of work and the pain of job loss
sections.screenshot_description_en: Dr. Aaron Dominguez connects Rerum Novarum with the dignity of work.
sections.content_en: **Dr. Aaron Dominguez** connects the discussion about job loss with the encyclical *Rerum Novarum*, suggesting that a future version of that encyclical, 'Rerum Novarum 2.0', will likely emphasize human dignity. He emphasizes that work, especially for men, contributes to human dignity, and a just wage for honorable work provides a sense of worth. Taking away that work, regardless of the reason, causes great pain. **John Brayer** adds that this problem is now even more acute because job loss due to automation currently most affects employees at lower levels and those who are just coming out of college, because those are the jobs that are most easily automated. This creates pastoral problems, especially for the demographic group from twenty to twenty-five years old, and over time this problem will spread as AI improves.

sections.subtitle: Izazov slobodnog vremena i ljudskog razvoja: Izbjegavanje 'nezasluženog užitka'
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj govori o opasnostima 'nezasluženog užitka' i važnosti rada.
sections.content:
Voditelj izražava oprez prema optimističnim scenarijima gdje AI osigurava materijalne potrebe po niskoj cijeni, dajući ljudima više slobodnog vremena. Upozorava na opasnost 'nezasluženog užitka' i 'neiskorištene udobnosti', ističući da se ljudi razvijaju kroz učenje, izazove i trud. Sposobnost obrazovanja da pomogne ljudima pronaći svoje zanimanje i viziju za budućnost postaje ključna.

**John Brayer** nadovezuje se na to, naglašavajući da je istraživanje i definiranje 'pravog slobodnog vremena' velika potreba u obiteljima i školama. Spominje kako su pape pisale o čežnji za slobodom, ali postavlja pitanje na što ćemo tu slobodu potrošiti kada je postignemo. Obrazovne institucije imaju ključnu ulogu u usmjeravanju ljudi kako bi mogli iskusiti slobodno vrijeme na produktivan način.

**Dr. Aaron Dominguez** dodaje pojam 'utropija' za stanje kada se ne zna kako se opustiti ili otići na odmor. Brayer to ilustrira anegdotom o bakinoj supruzi i promjeni odmora nakon izuma auto-telefona, ističući kako digitalna tehnologija sve više otežava potpuno isključivanje i pravi odmor.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak ispravno upozorava na opasnost dokolice bez svrhe, naglašavajući da je napor nužan za cjeloviti ljudski razvoj.
magisterium.enrichment: Slobodno vrijeme treba koristiti za duhovni i kulturni rast, a ne samo za pasivni užitak. Crkva naglašava da tehnološki napredak mora biti usklađen s moralnim razvojem kako bi se izbjeglo 'razmišljanje bez razmišljanja' i gubitak ljudske autonomije.

citations.document_title: Gaudium et Spes
Gaudium et Spes

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage correctly warns of the danger of idleness without purpose, emphasizing that effort is necessary for integral human development.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Free time should be used for spiritual and cultural growth, and not only for passive pleasure. The Church emphasizes that technological progress must be aligned with moral development in order to avoid 'thinking without thinking' and the loss of human autonomy.

sections.subtitle_en: The challenge of free time and human development: Avoiding 'undeserved pleasure'
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host speaks about the dangers of 'unearned pleasure' and the importance of work.
sections.content_en:
The host expresses caution toward optimistic scenarios where AI ensures material needs at a low price, giving people more free time. He warns of the danger of 'undeserved pleasure' and 'unused comfort', emphasizing that people develop through learning, challenges, and effort. The ability of education to help people find their occupation and vision for the future becomes crucial.

**John Brayer** builds on that, emphasizing that the exploration and definition of 'true free time' is a great need in families and schools. He mentions how the popes wrote about the longing for freedom, but poses the question of what we will spend that freedom on when we achieve it. Educational institutions have a key role in directing people so they can experience free time in a productive way.

**Dr. Aaron Dominguez** adds the term 'utropia' for the state when one does not know how to relax or go on vacation. Brayer illustrates this with an anecdote about his grandmother's wife and the change in vacation after the invention of the car phone, emphasizing how digital technology increasingly makes complete disconnection and true rest difficult.

sections.subtitle: Praktični koraci za katoličke institucije: AI 'boot camp' za biskupe i edukacija
sections.screenshot_description: Dr. Aaron Dominguez objašnjava AI 'boot camp' za biskupe.
sections.content: U kontekstu ubrzanog razvoja umjetne inteligencije, **dr. Aaron Dominguez** iznosi konkretne praktične korake koje katoličke institucije mogu poduzeti. Kao nacionalna sveučilišna ustanova, Katoličko sveučilište u Americi služi Crkvi Sjedinjenih Država i biskupima. Prepoznajući da mnogi biskupi možda nisu upoznati s AI, sveučilište je razvilo **AI 'boot camp' za biskupe**. Ovaj program, koji će uskoro biti dostupan, sastoji se od petnaestominutnih asinkronih online modula. Cilj je educirati biskupe o osnovama AI, jeziku, alatima i kako ih mogu koristiti za svoje dijeceze i svećenike. Osim toga, sveučilište se fokusira na edukaciju vlastitih studenata i poticanje javnih rasprava o AI, poput ovog podcasta, kako bi se promišljalo o ovim važnim temama.

magisterium.assessment: Prijedlog je izravno usklađen s pozivima Crkve na edukaciju klera i institucija o etičkim izazovima AI.
magisterium.enrichment: Katolička sveučilišta pozvana su biti 'laboratoriji nade' koji istražuju AI kroz dijalog vjere i razuma. Formacija biskupa i laika o digitalnoj etici ključna je za pastoralno vodstvo u novom tehnološkom dobu.

citations.document_title: Joint Letter on Artificial Intelligence Principles and Priorities (9 June 2025)
citations.document_author: United States Conference of Catholic Bishops

citations.document_title: Joint Letter on Artificial Intelligence Principles and Priorities (9 June 2025)
citations.document_author: United States Conference of Catholic Bishops

magisterium.assessment_en: The proposal is directly aligned with the Church's calls for the education of the clergy and institutions about the ethical challenges of AI.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Catholic universities are called to be 'laboratories of hope' that explore AI through the dialogue of faith and reason. Formation of bishops and laity on digital ethics is crucial for pastoral leadership in the new technological age.

sections.subtitle_en: Practical steps for Catholic institutions: AI 'boot camp' for bishops and education
sections.screenshot_description_en: Dr. Aaron Dominguez explains AI 'boot camp' for bishops.
sections.content_en: In the context of the accelerated development of artificial intelligence, **dr. Aaron Dominguez** presents concrete practical steps that Catholic institutions can take. As a national university institution, the Catholic University of America serves the Church of the United States and the bishops. Recognizing that many bishops may not be familiar with AI, the university has developed an **AI 'boot camp' for bishops**. This program, which will soon be available, consists of fifteen-minute asynchronous online modules. The goal is to educate bishops about the basics of AI, the language, tools, and how they can use them for their dioceses and priests. In addition, the university focuses on the education of its own students and the encouragement of public discussions about AI, like this podcast, in order to reflect on these important topics.

sections.subtitle: Snalaženje u AI resursima: Potreba za jasnim i fokusiranim smjernicama
sections.screenshot_description: John Brayer govori o izazovu prevelikog broja AI resursa.
sections.content: **John Brayer** izražava ohrabrenje zbog sve većeg broja pojedinaca i institucija koje se bave pitanjima umjetne inteligencije, kao i zbog objavljivanja brojnih resursa i okvira za promišljanje o AI. Međutim, upozorava na potencijalni izazov preopterećenja vjernika prevelikim brojem informacija. S obzirom na stotine dostupnih okvira i videozapisa, Brayer naglašava potrebu za preciznim i fokusiranim smjernicama. Smatra da je najkorisnije započeti s razjašnjavanjem jezika i pojmova vezanih uz AI, a zatim se usredotočiti na rješavanje specifičnih problema. Umjesto općenitog poziva na korištenje AI, institucije bi trebale identificirati konkretne probleme i ponuditi rješenja koja AI može pružiti.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak je u potpunosti usklađen s crkvenim naukom jer naglašava potrebu za jasnim moralnim i društvenim razlučivanjem usred brzog tehnološkog napretka.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva naglašava da tehnička ažuriranja nisu dovoljna; potrebno je njegovati 'srce koje sluša' i inteligenciju koja razlučuje kako bi tehnologija služila općem dobru. Papa Leo XIV ističe da je moralno razlučivanje ključno kako bi ljudska inteligencija, savjest i sloboda uvijek upravljali inovacijama.

citations.document_title: Apostolic Letter 'Drawing New Maps of Hope' of Pope Leo XIV
Encyclical Letter of His Holiness Leo XIV Magnifica Humanitas (15 May 2026)

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage is fully aligned with Church teaching because it emphasizes the need for clear moral and social discernment amidst rapid technological progress.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church emphasizes that technical updates are not enough; it is necessary to cultivate a 'listening heart' and an intelligence that discerns so that technology would serve the common good. Pope Leo XIV emphasizes that moral discernment is crucial so that human intelligence, conscience, and freedom would always govern innovations.

sections.subtitle_en: Navigating AI resources: The need for clear and focused guidelines
sections.screenshot_description_en: John Brayer speaks about the challenge of an excessive number of AI resources.
sections.content_en: **John Brayer** expresses encouragement due to the increasing number of individuals and institutions dealing with issues of artificial intelligence, as well as due to the publication of numerous resources and frameworks for reflecting on AI. However, he warns of the potential challenge of overloading the faithful with an excessive amount of information. Given the hundreds of available frameworks and videos, Brayer emphasizes the need for precise and focused guidelines. He believes that it is most useful to start by clarifying the language and terms related to AI, and then focus on solving specific problems. Instead of a general call to use AI, institutions should identify concrete problems and offer solutions that AI can provide.

sections.subtitle: Zaključak i poziv na akciju
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj zahvaljuje gostima i poziva na nastavak rada.
sections.content: Voditelj zaključuje razgovor, zahvaljujući **dr. Aaronu Dominguezu** i **Johnu Brayeru** na njihovom sudjelovanju i uvidima. Izražava nadu da će se vratiti na konferenciju 'Builders AI' kako bi nastavili rad na ovim važnim pitanjima. Gosti se zahvaljuju na pozivu, naglašavajući važnost daljnjeg promišljanja i djelovanja u vezi s umjetnom inteligencijom i njezinim utjecajem na društvo i Crkvu.

magisterium.assessment: Ovaj zaključak promiče nauk poticanjem interdisciplinarne suradnje i dijaloga vjere i razuma u kontekstu razvoja AI za misiju Crkve.
magisterium.enrichment: Papa Leo XIV izričito je pozdravio 'Builders AI Forum' kao važan doprinos zajedničkoj misiji stavljanja tehnologije u službu evangelizacije i integralnog razvoja osobe. Takva suradnja utjelovljuje dijalog vjere i razuma, potvrđujući da inteligencija nalazi svoj puni smisao u ljubavi i odnosu s Bogom.

citations.document_title: Message of the Holy Father to participants in the "Builders AI Forum 2025" (7 November 2025)

magisterium.assessment_en: This conclusion promotes the teaching by encouraging interdisciplinary cooperation and the dialogue of faith and reason in the context of the development of AI for the mission of the Church.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Pope Leo XIV explicitly welcomed 'Builders AI Forum' as an important contribution to the common mission of putting technology in the service of evangelization and the integral development of the person. Such cooperation embodies the dialogue of faith and reason, confirming that intelligence finds its full meaning in love and relationship with God.

sections.screenshot_description_en: The host thanks the guests and invites to the continuation of work.
sections.content_en: The host concludes the conversation, thanking **dr. Aaron Dominguez** and **John Brayer** for their participation and insights. He expresses hope that they will return to the 'Builders AI' conference in order to continue work on these important questions. The guests thank for the invitation, emphasizing the importance of further reflection and action regarding artificial intelligence and its impact on society and the Church.

iterations.theme_en: Artificial intelligence and Catholic education: Ethical challenges and opportunities
